- 新增播放器截图功能，可将当前画面保存为图片
- 新增播放器控件自定义，可隐藏或显示各个播放控制按钮
- 新增云端标签页显示开关，可在设置中控制底部导航栏是否显示云端入口
- 移除旧版播放控件，统一使用 Material You 风格

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Add player screenshot to save the current frame as an image
- Add player control customization to show or hide individual playback buttons
- Add cloud tab toggle to control whether the cloud entry appears in the bottom navigation bar
- Remove legacy player controls and unify to Material You style

</details>
